approved_by: human governance decision approving E4 bootstrap execution with architectural decisions 1–15

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

pnpm-lock.yaml — updated by pnpm install after adding workspace dependency.
mutations.note: node_modules/ directories are install artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: aggregates / value-objects / events / state-machines / repositories / services / use-cases / policies / errors.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 1; aligns with MOD-001 purity rules.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: ids / enums / dto / api / events / errors / pagination / responses / branding.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 2; transport contracts separated from domain DTOs.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Branded string identifiers via phantom type pattern.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 3; compile-time safety with zero runtime cost.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: PostgreSQL UUID primary keys exposed as branded string IDs in TypeScript.

local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 5; avoids floating-point arithmetic.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Domain uses number 0–5 with 0.5 precision; SQL uses decimal(2,1).

Canonical lifecycle with explicit transitions: Draft → Requested → Accepted → ProfessionalAssigned → EnRoute → Arrived → InProgress → Completed → PaymentPending → Paid → Closed, plus terminal branches.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 9; invariants centralized despite R1 remaining open.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Events grouped by bounded context under events/{identity,booking,execution,payments,reviews,messaging,notifications}.

local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 11; current marketplace is Customer ↔ Professional ↔ Booking.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: identity, marketplace, booking, execution, communication, payments, reviews, media, documents, notifications, system.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Approved architectural decision 12 plus optional system schema.
Approved architectural decision 13; easier merge ordering.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Interfaces live in packages/domain; implementations belong in packages/sdk later.
Value-object validation, state-machine, aggregate invariant, event emission, use-case, and in-memory repository contract tests.
Address modeled as a value object and identity.addresses table; standalone Location aggregate deferred.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E4 scope does not require a full Location aggregate; address is sufficient for booking and identity.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Implemented a single canonical migration file instead of one per bounded context.
deviations_from_plan.justification: E4 establishes the initial schema baseline; subsequent expeditions can add focused incremental migrations. Ordering dependencies are still explicit in the single file.

validation_results.note: SQL migration syntax was reviewed against DB-001 but not executed against a live database in this expedition.

exclusions: No application screens or Expo Router code generated.
No Supabase client SDK code generated.
No business logic wired to the mobile app.

No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record and governance-0010.
